campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the transit authority's investment performance for March 2026 and adopted a new policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement activities. The council also discussed job openings and strategies to recruit and retain city employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city policy prohibiting federal civil enforcement on city-owned property
City job vacancies and employee recruitment and retention efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing on April 15, 2026, to discuss plans to clean up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County. They also adopted a new technology policy and approved a process for residents to request accommodations from the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by County
Adoption of new Technology Disruption Policy
Process for filing reasonable accommodation requests with the city

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review March financial reports, and authorize several spending and contracting decisions. Key actions included accepting a donation of emergency medical equipment, approving road paving work, and submitting grant applications for statewide programs.
keyTopics: Approved road construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED) equipment
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment reports
Authorized grant applications for state programs
Set project list for fiscal year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming council sessions and review their work plans. They cancelled their May 26 meeting and discussed items to add to their June 2 agenda, while also updating plans for neighborhood services, education, and government rules.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
Planning June 2, 2026 agenda items
Updates to Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updates to Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Approval of city-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and hear from residents during public comment. The main focus was selecting and recommending applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Updates on boards, commissions, and committees

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April meeting minutes and special recognitions for these community observances.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on May 19, 2026 to update the city's long-term health and safety planning document and to recognize the Public Works Department for their work maintaining streets, sidewalks, parks, and city facilities. The council also acknowledged Asian American Pacific Islander Month during the meeting.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of General Plan (covering 2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department during Public Works Week
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss matters related to the station area. The full agenda details were not included in the notice provided.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Hybrid format: in-person and Zoom participation available

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, to address several land development and city management matters. The council considered new ordinances, approved a site development permit amendment with a vesting tentative map, confirmed assessments for a public improvement project, and appointed a permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and ordinance additions under consideration
Site development permit amendment and vesting tentative map approval
Public assessment confirmation and ordering for improvements
Permanent City Manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city meet air quality standards set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and progress
Proposed principles for home electrification assistance programs
Compliance with Air District regulations
Staff presentation and council member announcements
